mapper.select:
SELECT n.id, n.user_id AS userId, n.shop_id AS shopId, n.title, n.content, n.images, n.score, n.like_count AS likeCount, n.collect_count AS collectCount, n.category_id AS categoryId, n.status, n.reject_reason AS rejectReason, n.create_time AS createTime, u.nickname, u.avatar, s.name AS shopName, c.name AS categoryName, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM likes WHERE note_id = n.id AND user_id = #{userId}) AS liked, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM collect WHERE note_id = n.id AND user_id = #{userId}) AS collected FROM note n LEFT JOIN user u ON n.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN shop s ON n.shop_id = s.id LEFT JOIN category c ON n.category_id = c.id WHERE n.status = 1
AND n.category_id = #{categoryId}
AND n.shop_id = #{shopId}
AND (n.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR n.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY (n.like_count + n.collect_count) DESC, n.create_time DESC
ORDER BY n.create_time DESC
LIMIT #{offset}, 12
